A Brief History of U.S. Industrial Energy Data¶

The following are excerpts from McMillan et al. (2024) [McMillanetal2024]_ .

[McMillanetal2024]

McMillan, Colin, Carrie Schoeneberger, Sarang Supekar, and David Thierry. “The Foundational Industrial Energy Dataset (FIED): Open-Source Data on Industrial Facilities.” Golden, CO: National Renewable Energy Laboratory (NREL), September 5, 2024. https://doi.org/10.2172/2440617.
